old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.59.4","title":"Validate Zephyr non-link integration rows","description":"Scope under project-LICHEN-2auf.59: validate recovered MeshCore, Meshtastic, BLE, and SLIP integration/transport slices on every declared native_sim/native/64 and applicable QEMU build/runtime scenario from a fresh clean EBS worktree.
